ideation: This animation sequence depicts a woman technologist engrossed in her work.  The primary focus will be on the hands, which will mimic the actions of typing or coding. The animation will start with the hands resting on the keyboard, move to a typing position, then back to a resting position, before finally settling into a thinking pose. The left arm will remain relatively static to provide a counterpoint to the more dynamic right arm. Frame 1 will start with both arms in a neutral position, with the hands slightly raised as if hovering over a keyboard. Frame 2 will show the right arm actively typing, with the left arm remaining at rest. Frame 3 will show the hands returning to the hovering position. Frame 4 will have the right hand near the chin in a thinking pose, with the left arm still in a relaxed position.  Each frame should clearly display the change in arm position.

frames.beat: arms rest, ready to type code
right hand dances on the keyboard, left arm still
hands hover, pausing the coding session
right hand moves to chin, deep in thought
